input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.2.3
            TITLE: each accumulator segment must be electrically insulated with suitable nonflammable

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.2.3: Each Accumulator Segment must be electrically insulated with suitable Nonflammable
EV.5.2.3 Each Accumulator Segment must be electrically insulated with suitable Nonflammable 
Material (F.1.18) (not air) for the two:  
a. Between the segments in the container  
b. On top of the segment  
The intent is to prevent arc flashes caused by inter segment contact or by parts/tools 
accidentally falling into the container during maintenance for example.

final_answer: Each Accumulator Segment must be electrically insulated with suitable Nonflammable Material (F.1.18) (not air) for the two: a. Between the segments in the container b. On top of the segment
